'''âr-b-n-l''' ('''karabneloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whing|whing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whing|whing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-b-n-l
|-
! Lemma
| karabneloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirabneloko|thirabneloko]] || [[word:jirabneloko|jirabneloko]] || [[word:shirabneloko|shirabneloko]] || [[word:kirabneloko|kirabneloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurabneloko|thuthurabneloko]] || [[word:jujurabneloko|jujurabneloko]] || [[word:shushurabneloko|shushurabneloko]] || [[word:kukurabneloko|kukurabneloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurabneloko|thurabneloko]] || [[word:jurabneloko|jurabneloko]] || [[word:shurabneloko|shurabneloko]] || [[word:kurabneloko|kurabneloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorabneloko|thorabneloko]] || [[word:jorabneloko|jorabneloko]] || [[word:shorabneloko|shorabneloko]] || [[word:korabneloko|korabneloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrabneloko|thĂŠrabneloko]] || [[word:jĂŠrabneloko|jĂŠrabneloko]] || [[word:shĂŠrabneloko|shĂŠrabneloko]] || [[word:kĂŠrabneloko|kĂŠrabneloko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharabneloko|tharabneloko]] || [[word:jarabneloko|jarabneloko]] || [[word:sharabneloko|sharabneloko]] || [[word:karabneloko|karabneloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharabneloko|tharabneloko]] || [[word:jarabneloko|jarabneloko]] || [[word:sharabneloko|sharabneloko]] || [[word:karabneloko|karabneloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
